name: ZW - Phoenix Bow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＺＷ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼアル・ウェポン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>不死鳥弩弓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フェニックス・ボウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can target 1 face-up "Number C39: Utopia Ray" you control; equip this card from your hand to that target. It gains 1100 ATK. When the equipped monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent. You can only control 1 face-up "ZW - Phoenix Bow".
mnst_eff: You can target 1 face-up "Number C39: Utopia Ray" you control; equip this card from your hand to that target. It gains 1100 ATK. When the equipped monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent. You can only control 1 face-up "ZW - Phoenix Bow".
eff: You can target 1 face-up "Number C39: Utopia Ray" you control; equip this card from your hand to that target. It gains 1100 ATK. When the equipped monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent. You can only control 1 face-up "ZW - Phoenix Bow".

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
